items.title_en: Andy Burnham wins Makerfield by-election, opening path to challenging Prime Minister Keir Starmer
items.title_zh: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 赢得梅克菲尔德补选，为挑战总理凯尔·斯塔默 (Keir Starmer) 开辟道路
items.desc_en: Andy Burnham won the Makerfield by-election, defeating Reform UK by more than 9,000 votes with nearly 55% of the vote.
items.desc_zh: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 赢得梅克菲尔德补选，以近 55% 的选票，以 9000 多票的优势击败改革英国 (Reform UK)。

items.title_en: Indian IT stocks slump up to 7% as Accenture cuts revenue outlook, fueling fresh concerns over sector growth
items.title_zh: 埃森哲下调收入预期，印度 IT 股暴跌 7%，引发对行业增长的新担忧
items.desc_en: Shares of major Indian IT companies fall up to 7% after global sector leader Accenture cuts its revenue guidance.
items.desc_zh: 全球行业领导者埃森哲下调收入预期后，印度主要 IT 公司股价下跌 7%。

items.title_en: Zealand Pharma stock suffered its two worst days on record. Here's what's next for the weight loss drugmaker
items.title_zh: 新西兰制药公司的股价经历了有记录以来最糟糕的两天。这是减肥制药商的下一步计划
items.desc_en: While the market's enthusiasm for one of Zealand's experimental drugs has cooled, investors are shifting focus to amylin-based medicines as a growth driver
items.desc_zh: 虽然市场对新西兰一种实验药物的热情已经降温，但投资者正在将注意力转向以胰淀素为基础的药物，将其作为增长动力

items.title_en: Yen slides past 161 against the dollar, nearing 40-year low and reviving intervention bets
items.title_zh: 日元兑美元跌破161，接近40年低点，干预押注重燃
items.desc_en: On Thursday the yen saw a sharp depreciation a high of 161.80, its weakest since July 2024.
items.desc_zh: 周四日元大幅贬值至161.80高点，为2024年7月以来的最低水平。

items.title_en: At center opening, Obama denounces those who use power ‘to divvy up the spoils’ - The Washington Post

items.title_en: Oil drifts lower as Strait of Hormuz reopens, focus shifts to demand outlook
items.title_zh: 随着霍尔木兹海峡重新开放，油价下跌，焦点转向需求前景
items.desc_en: With immediate supply fears fading and tanker traffic returning to the Strait of Hormuz, traders are turning their attention back to oil demand and OPEC's outlook for the market.
items.desc_zh: 随着当前供应担忧的消退以及油轮运输返回霍尔木兹海峡，交易商将注意力重新转向石油需求和欧佩克对市场的前景。

items.desc_zh: 摩根士丹利资本国际 (MSCI) 指出，人们对印度尼西亚股市透明度的担忧日益加剧。

items.desc_zh: 近 200 架乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯首都东南部的一个地区，一座炼油厂和一座购物中心被烧毁。

items.title_en: Lawyer in high-profile Ugandan treason case charged with related offence
items.title_zh: 备受瞩目的乌干达叛国案律师被控相关罪行
items.desc_en: Uganda's military chief had boasted of "the hurt and pain" he would inflict on Erias Lukwago, who was arrested earlier this week.
items.desc_zh: 乌干达军事首领吹嘘他会给本周早些时候被捕的埃里亚斯·卢瓦戈造成“伤害和痛苦”。

items.title_en: Suspected gang leader shot dead in flower bouquet ambush at airport
items.title_zh: 涉嫌团伙头目在机场鲜花花束伏击中被枪杀
items.desc_en: The gunmen concealed their weapons behind flowers and stuffed toys while waiting for the victim outside Guayaquil airport.
items.desc_zh: 枪手在瓜亚基尔机场外等待受害者时，将武器藏在鲜花和毛绒玩具后面。

items.title_en: Gunfire and explosions heard at Niger capital's airport
items.title_zh: 尼日尔首都机场传出枪声和爆炸声
items.desc_en: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.
items.desc_zh: 尼日尔十年来一直在与激进的伊斯兰叛乱分子作战，今年一月，疑似圣战分子袭击了同一机场。

items.title_en: Apple to raise prices as AI boom pushes up chip costs
items.title_zh: 人工智能热潮推高芯片成本 苹果将提价
items.desc_en: The firm's outgoing boss Tim Cook did not say when prices would rise or which products would be affected.
items.desc_zh: 该公司即将卸任的老板蒂姆·库克没有透露价格何时上涨或哪些产品会受到影响。

items.title_en: Bird flu kills more than 75% of baby seals on remote Australian island, study finds
items.title_zh: 研究发现，澳大利亚偏远岛屿上75%以上的小海豹死于禽流感
items.desc_en: Scientists say 13,000 southern elephant seal pups on Heard Island have died of the H5N1 strain.
items.desc_zh: 科学家表示，赫德岛上有 13,000 只南象海豹幼崽死于 H5N1 病毒株。

items.title_en: Japan ramping up defence is 'critical' to prevent war, Defence Minister Koizumi tells BBC
items.title_zh: 日本防卫大臣小泉纯一郎告诉 BBC，日本加强防卫对于防止战争“至关重要”
items.desc_en: Japan needs to revisit the pacifist posture that has defined it since World War Two, Shinjiro Koizumi says.
items.desc_zh: 小泉进二郎表示，日本需要重新审视自第二次世界大战以来定义的和平主义姿态。

items.desc_zh: 这位亚马逊创始人现在拥有机器人和太空旅行公司，他认为人工智能将造成劳动力短缺。

items.desc_en: Sites including Instagram, YouTube and TikTok will become inaccessible for millions of children, the prime minister has announced.
items.desc_zh: 总理宣布，数百万儿童将无法访问 Instagram、YouTube 和 TikTok 等网站。

items.desc_zh: 这些措施将使英国青少年在 2027 年初屏蔽 TikTok 和 Snapchat 等应用程序。
